creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
makc        2010-09-04 09:29:48 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    print/cups-samba     Makefile 
    print/cups-samba/files pkg-message.in 
  Log:
  - Simplify and reorganize pkg-message by referring to relevant sections
    of cupsaddsmb(8)
  - Add information how to obtain support for 64-bit Windows machines.
  - Correctness of instructions validated against fresh install of Samba-3.4
    and Windows7 x64.
  
  PR:             ports/148937
  Submitted by:   Marcin Wisnicki (maintainer)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.15      +1 -1      ports/print/cups-samba/Makefile
  1.3       +47 -91    ports/print/cups-samba/files/pkg-message.in
